sections.core: The only cash core underwrite is Safe Celebration (security). Everything else — dinner, Santa, crafts, inflatables, print, talent — lives in the gift registry. Without gifts, the evening would be skeletal but safe.
sections.registry: Named gifts with slot counts — use the counter on each card to claim up to the maximum slots. This is the substance of the fete.
sections.tiers: Sponsorship tiers also have slot counts. Use the counter to claim up to the maximum for Friend through Title. Tier benefits stack with naming credit on any gifts you fund.
sections.options: Presenting- and Title-level sponsorships unlock the strongest logo placement and stage recognition.
